---
title: "Session 3: Classical NLP Tasks"
subtitle: "Day 1 · Introduction & First Experience (1-3)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 3: Classical NLP Tasks

## 📋 Agenda

- Text preprocessing
- Tokenization
- Dictionary look-up with basic Python

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Text preprocessing

## Text preprocessing

<!-- to be added -->

# Tokenization

## Tokenization

<!-- to be added -->

# Dictionary look-up

## Dictionary look-up

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
